compiled_state.title: Move implementation body from sprint-list-epics.sh to ticket-list-epics.sh
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## TDD Exemption
Unit criterion 2 (change-detector): The only new assertion possible is 'implementation now exists in ticket-list-epics.sh' which is a source-grep, not behavioral. Behavioral contract is fully verified by existing tests: test-ticket-list-epics-dispatcher.sh (6 tests — exercise ticket-list-epics.sh through the dispatcher entry point) and test-sprint-list-epics.sh (47 tests — sprint-list-epics.sh unchanged in this task). Zero new observable behaviors are introduced.

## Implementation
1. Replace ticket-list-epics.sh content (currently a 4-line exec wrapper to sprint-list-epics.sh) with the full 446-line implementation currently in sprint-list-epics.sh. Preserve all shebang, set flags, comments, and logic exactly.
2. Update ticket-lib-api.sh line ~955 comment from "delegates to sprint-list-epics.sh (canonical; no prior script)" to "delegates to ticket-list-epics.sh (canonical; sprint-list-epics.sh is now the thin wrapper)"
3. sprint-list-epics.sh is NOT changed in this task.

After this task: ticket-list-epics.sh holds the full implementation and no longer exec's to sprint-list-epics.sh. sprint-list-epics.sh still holds its own copy of the full implementation (temporarily duplicated). Both scripts produce identical output for the same inputs.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list-epics.sh (modify: replace 4-line exec with full 446-line impl)
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh (modify: update comment at ~line 955)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — all 47 sprint-list-epics tests + 6 dispatcher tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] ticket-list-epics.sh does NOT exec to sprint-list-epics.sh anymore
  Verify: ! grep -q 'exec.*sprint-list-epics' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list-epics.sh

- [ ] ticket-list-epics.sh produces identical 3-valued exit behavior: exit 1 on empty tracker
  Verify: TRACKER=$(mktemp -d) && bash plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-list-epics.sh 2>/dev/null; EC=$?; rm -rf "$TRACKER"; [ "$EC" -eq 1 ]

- [ ] ticket-list-epics.sh produces P* prefix for in-progress epics (dispatcher path)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-list-epics-dispatcher.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'Results: 6 passed, 0 failed'

- [ ] ticket-lib-api.sh comment updated to reflect new canonical location
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-list-epics.sh.*canonical' plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh

- [ ] sprint-list-epics.sh is unchanged (wc -l same as before)
  Verify: [ "$(wc -l < plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-list-epics.sh)" -ge 440 ]

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
